title: Node
description: A single location within a region — the unit of the fog-of-war node graph (FR-MAP-01). Static definition only: live per-node memory (searchPct, damage, corpses, noise, fog-of-war discovery, ...) lives in GameState.nodes, seeded from this definition at run start. Routes are the undirected edges of the graph; the engine's map integrity check requires them to be symmetric and the whole region to be connected from its single start node.

$schema.description: Optional editor hint pointing at this schema.

id.description: Stable content id of the form node.<region-slug>.<node-slug>, e.g. "node.rivermouth.transit-plaza". Referenced by id from GameState (never embedded).

regionId.description: Id of the region this node belongs to (FR-MAP-01 — locations grouped into regions).

name.description: Player-facing display name (ICU MessageFormat string, LOCALIZATION §13).

description.description: Short flavor description shown when the node is scouted or entered (ICU MessageFormat string).

adjacent.description: Node ids directly reachable by one travel step (the graph's edges). Must be symmetric (if A lists B, B lists A) — enforced by the engine's map integrity check, not the schema.

start.description: True on exactly one node per shipped region set — where a new run begins. The engine rejects a set with zero or many start nodes.

claimable.description: True if this node can be claimed as a safehouse (FR-MAP-06). A claimed node can later be lost; claim state itself lives in GameState, not here.

notes.description: Author commentary. JSON has no comments (ADR-0002); use this field.

kind.description: Location kind — selects the loot plausibility table for searches here (FR-ECO-02, T17). Defaults to generic when absent.
